batches.recipe_prompt: Mountain biker descending a rocky forest trail, wearing full-face downhill helmet, protective gloves, and jersey with armor, the wearable remote from image 1 with its velcro strap wrapped fully around the LEFT lower forearm OVER the jersey sleeve, positioned halfway between wrist and elbow, PLUS button closest to wrist, five round tactile buttons, both hands on handlebars, waist-up, Shot on Sony A7R IV 85mm f/2.0, dappled forest light, film grain

Female motorcycle rider threading through traffic on a suspension bridge at golden hour, downtown skyline rising behind her catching warm amber light. Waist-up framing captured on Sony A7R IV with 85mm f/2.0 lens, shallow depth of field isolating the rider against softly blurred traffic and glowing city towers. Rim light wraps around her silhouette from the low sun, creating a golden halo effect. Bridge cables slice through the frame diagonally, leading the eye toward the backlit urban skyline. Warm streetlight glow beginning to compete with natural sunset tones. Film grain texture, photorealistic rendering with dynamic motion blur on passing vehicles, asphalt reflecting streaks of orange and gold.. female motorcycle rider wearing full-face helmet, leather riding jacket with armor, thick leather riding gloves, the wearable remote from image 1 with its velcro strap wrapped fully around the LEFT lower forearm OVER the sleeve, positioned halfway between wrist and elbow, PLUS (+) button closest to WRIST, MINUS (−) button closest to elbow, LED window closest to wrist, five round tactile buttons in a vertical row, device parallel to the forearm not perpendicular, waist-up, warm golden-hour light, film grain.

Mountain biker descending a rocky forest trail, wearing full-face downhill helmet, protective gloves, and long-sleeve jersey with armor, the wearable remote from image 1 with its velcro strap wrapped fully around the LEFT lower forearm OVER the sleeve, positioned halfway between wrist and elbow, PLUS (+) button closest to WRIST, MINUS (−) button closest to elbow, LED window closest to wrist, five round tactile buttons in a vertical row, device parallel to the forearm not perpendicular, both hands on handlebars, waist-up, Shot on Sony A7R IV 85mm f/2.0, dappled forest light, film grain
